column3: "Rosemary reduce oxidative stress" refers to its ability to lessen the harmful effects of reactive molecules known as free radicals on cells, protecting and improving cellular health.
"Rosemary improve memory and concentration" refers to its ability to enhance cognitive functions, which may include increased memory retention and better focus.
"Rosemary alleviate anxiety and depression" refers to its ability to reduce stress and improve mood naturally due to certain properties it contains.
"Rosemary lower inflammation levels" refers to its ability to decrease body swelling due to infections or other reasons, enhancing overall health.
"Rosemary protect against cancer" refers to its capability to possess beneficial chemicals that can help prevent or reduce cancer growth within a person's body.

"Rosemary support respiratory health" refers to its role in promoting better breathing by potentially reducing inflammation and improving mucous clearance within the lungs, thereby contributing to overall respiratory well-being.
"Rosemary promote digestive health" refers to its ability to aid in proper food breakdown and nutrient absorption within the body, contributing to overall well-being.
"Rosemary boost immune system function" refers to its ability to strengthen the body's natural defenses against illnesses by stimulating the immune system.
"Rosemary improve bone health" refers to its ability to supply calcium and other nutrients needed for healthy bones.

"Rosemary enhance sleep quality" refers to its ability to help individuals fall asleep faster and enjoy a deeper and better quality 
         restful sleep.
